briefdescription.para: This function initialize required platform specific peripherals.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if required peripherals are initialized and configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sets GT in 16-bits (2-Byte) or 32-bits (4-Byte) mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Video PHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets proper ref clk frequency and line rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Video PHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reports CRC values of Video components.
This function Calculates CRC values of Video components.
This function load EDID content into EDID Memory.

detaileddescription.para: User can change as per their requirement.

briefdescription.para: This function is a non-blocking UART return byte.
This function is called when DisplayPort Subsystem core requires delay or sleep.

detaileddescription.para: It provides timer with predefined amount of loop iterations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: i2c_write_dp141

briefdescription.para: This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

detaileddescription.para: Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx
None This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

None.
None.
None. Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx
None This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The DPTX Subsystem core could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function puts the TI LMK03318 into sleep.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function to get uart input from user.

detaileddescription.para:
timeout_ms
received character
None. This function to get uart input from user.

None.
None.
None. This function to get uart input from user

briefdescription.para: This function the IDT 8TN49N24x device with the data from the configuration table.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function to convert integer to hex.
